scenarios.title: Agent install hangs at “Validating Data”
scenarios.data_search: install reference agent install hangs at validating data install agent agent install hangs at validating data during agent install the browser displays validating data indefinitely instead of progressing to the sql server connection prompt or deploying the agent can t reach the database server verify each connection layer in turn what you re seeing agent install reaches validating data but never advances the sql server connection prompt is never displayed most common root cause the application server can t reach the database server port blocked missing database invalid credentials walk these checks check 1 manually verify reachability from app server to db server from the application server attempt a manual connection to the database server on the configured sql port typically 1433 to confirm reachability telnet db host 1433 or test netconnection db host port 1433 resolved stop here otherwise continue to check 2 check 2 confirm pre install database setup per the pre install database setup confirm the rapidreconciler_prod database exists on the target instance the rruser sql authentication login exists with correct permissions the instance is set to mixed mode sql windows authentication resolved stop here otherwise continue to check 3 check 3 inspect logs and event viewer check windows event viewer on the application server for rapidreconciler related errors check today s agent out and err log files see diagnostic tools if the install needs to be restarted ensure the setup step is set back to created in valc before retrying resolved stop here otherwise escalate to a senior tech dba with the log excerpts install reference

scenarios.title: Agent download prompt doesn’t appear after login
scenarios.data_search: install reference agent download prompt doesn t appear install migration agent download prompt doesn t appear after login network tech logs in to rapidreconciler getgsi com with gsiadmin credentials but no agent download prompt is shown affects fresh installs and migrations the underlying causes overlap with one extra check for migrations existing agent registration on the old server interfering what you re seeing page loads normally after login but the agent download ui is missing affects both fresh installs and migrations to a new server the setup step value on client details usually controls whether the prompt renders walk these checks check 1 verify setup step is created in valc the agent download prompt only renders when the customer s setup step is set to created on the client details tab any other value hides the prompt in valc open manage client client details for the customer verify setup step is created if not change it to created and save have the customer hard refresh the browser ctrl f5 cmd shift r and log in again with gsiadmin credentials resolved stop here otherwise continue to check 2 check 2 migration only clear old server agent registration when this applies migrating to a new server existing agent registration on the old server may still be active and prevent the prompt from appearing on the new server in valc set the setup step on the migrating customer to created and save hard refresh the browser on the new server and log in again with gsiadmin credentials the agent download prompt should now appear resolved stop here otherwise confirm no other browser session has the customer logged in elsewhere then escalate install reference

scenarios.title: Agent services not running on application server
scenarios.data_search: install reference agent services not running install application server agent services not running on application server in windows services console the rr valc agent service display name rapid reconciler 7 agent is stopped or fails to start common causes a windows update reboot the localsystem account hit a permission issue on the install root or the db a corrupted rr valc agent xml config or the winsw recovery loop restart 10s restart 30s reboot ran through its three attempts and gave up often resolves with a service restart what you re seeing services console services msc shows rapid reconciler 7 agent as stopped or failing to start symptom may surface elsewhere as agent disconnected on the valc clients grid or database unknown on the databases tab task manager shows no java exe processes since the parent agent supervises every child stopping the service terminates them all only one service to look for older docs referenced a second service called rapidreconciler services that no longer exists the current installer post winsw migration registers only the single rr valc agent service what older docs called rapidreconciler services is actually the agent s spawned child java exe processes one per rr database which appear in task manager but not in services msc see the rr agent reference for the parent child process model walk these checks check 1 restart the service on the application server open services console services msc find rapid reconciler 7 agent service name rr valc agent right click start or restart if it s in a stuck state confirm the status reaches running task manager details should show one java exe for the agent plus one per rr database within 30 seconds running stop here otherwise continue check 2 inspect logs and credentials open c program files rapid reconciler logs rr valc agent wrapper log this is winsw s own log and captures service start stop attempts plus the jvm launch arguments if the wrapper couldn t launch the jvm missing jar bad path jre error it s logged here then check today s rr valc agent_yyyymmdd out log and err log for the java side startup error if winsw did launch the jvm but the agent died early err log empty jvm didn t crash non empty almost always tells you what blew up by default the service runs as localsystem the shipped winsw config has no serviceaccount if it changed it post install to a custom account verify those credentials are still valid a recent password rotation can break it check windows event viewer application log for related errors at the time of failure winsw emits service control manager events here too if the wrapper log or err log indicates a config issue escalate to a senior tech to investigate the agent installation install reference

scenarios.title: Clients grid row not updating to “Connected” after install
scenarios.data_search: install reference clients grid not updating to connected install valc state clients grid row not updating to connected after install agent install reported installation complete but on the valc clients grid the row s status badge stays at the previous value instead of switching to connected walk down the layers dns services external ip to find the blocker what you re seeing install reports complete but valc clients grid still shows the old status valc isn t seeing a heartbeat from the agent walk these checks check 1 refresh the clients grid the page does not auto refresh refresh the clients grid in your browser if the install just completed also wait a few minutes resolved stop here otherwise continue check 2 verify dns propagation from the application server from the customer s application server try resolving the customer s getgsi com url if dns still returns the old ip the cloudflare update hasn t propagated yet dns correct continue to check 3 check 3 confirm the agent service is running on the application server open the windows services console and confirm rapid reconciler 7 agent service name rr valc agent is running there is only one service the agent supervises one java exe per rr database which show in task manager but not in services msc running continue to check 4 check 4 verify agent external ip on client details verify the agent external ip address on the client details tab matches the customer s actual external ip if the row still hasn t updated check today s agent out log file for connection errors back to valc resolved stop here otherwise escalate to the network tech install reference

scenarios.title: Companies tab is empty after install
scenarios.data_search: install reference companies tab empty after install install database ssis companies tab is empty after install database shows online on the databases tab but selecting it from the dropdown on the companies tab shows no company numbers to license companies populate from jde through the ssis package s first run if sql agent isn t running the ssis source connection is misconfigured or jde has no companies in the source tables the list stays empty what you re seeing database online but companies dropdown is empty no company numbers to license last sync timestamp on the companies tab may be missing or very old walk these checks check 1 check last company sync timestamp on the companies tab check the last company sync timestamp at the top right if it shows recent activity give the sync a few more minutes and refresh the page resolved stop here otherwise continue check 2 verify sql agent job state and history on the database server verify the rapidreconciler sql agent job is enabled confirm it has run successfully at least once check the sql agent job history for errors on the most recent run job healthy and run succeeded continue to check 3 check 3 escalate to dba if ssis source needs attention if the job is failing or has never run escalate to the gsi dba to investigate the ssis package and jde connection provide the job history error and the customer s jde source environment dba owns the ssis jde source investigation install reference

scenarios.title: SQL script fails during database install
scenarios.data_search: install reference sql script fails during database install install database sql script fails during database install one of the four install scripts database creation database objects rruser creation sql agent job errors out partway through each script has a distinct set of common causes identify which one is failing then walk the checks for that script what you re seeing ssms shows an error after executing one of the four install scripts shipped in the install zip subsequent scripts can t run because their prerequisites aren t in place e g script 2 fails because script 1 didn t finish or script 4 fails because the sql agent service isn t running common error wordings create file encountered operating system error cannot find object login failed password validation failed sql server agent service not running walk these checks check 1 identify which script failed the install zip ships four scripts that must run in order 1 rapidreconciler database creation script sql 2 rapidreconciler database object script 178 sql 3 rapidreconciler user creation script sql 4 rapidreconciler sql agent job creation script sql note the exact error text and which script produced it the rest of the checks branch on the script number identified jump to the matching check below check 2 script 1 database creation failed common causes create file encountered operating system error the sql server instance s default data path doesn t exist on this server or the sql server service account lacks write permission to the drive confirm the instance s default data and log paths in ssms right click instance properties database settings and that the sql server service account can write to them database rapidreconciler_prod already exists a prior failed install attempt left a stub database confirm with the customer dba that the database is safe to drop then drop database rapidreconciler_prod and re run script 1 login failed for user ssms is connected with credentials that don t have permission to create databases on this instance reconnect with an account that has sysadmin or dbcreator script 1 succeeded continue with script 2 check 3 script 2 database objects failed common causes cannot find object or invalid object name rapidreconciler_prod script 1 didn t finish cleanly verify the database exists and has the expected file groups before re running script 2 syntax errors on t sql features the script targets sql server 2016 or newer confirm the target instance s version with select version older instances aren t supported partial run leaves orphan objects if the script failed midway through drop the database with drop database rapidreconciler_prod and re run scripts 1 and 2 from a clean state rather than re running script 2 on top script 2 succeeded continue with script 3 check 4 script 3 rruser creation failed common causes login rruser already exists a prior attempt left the login behind drop it with drop login rruser and re run password validation failed password does not meet windows policy requirements the instance has a stricter password policy than the default the script uses either temporarily relax the policy on the sql server or open the script and replace the password with one that meets the customer s policy and record the new value you ll need it when configuring the rrlocal connection manager in the ssis package mixed mode authentication not enabled sql authentication logins won t work if the instance is windows authentication only enable mixed mode right click instance properties security and restart the sql server service script 3 succeeded continue with script 4 check 5 script 4 sql agent job failed common causes sql server agent service is not running or sqlserveragent is not currently running start the sql server agent service via the services console services msc or sql server configuration manager set its start mode to automatic so it survives reboots the specified job_name is already used a prior attempt left the job behind drop it from ssms sql server agent jobs right click rapidreconciler_prod delete or run exec msdb dbo sp_delete_job job_name rapidreconciler_prod then re run script 4 sql agent service account lacks sysadmin required to create jobs in msdb verify the service account s permissions if locked down run the script as a windows account that does have sysadmin script 4 succeeded database install is complete continue to step 8 ssis configuration check 6 still stuck if a script keeps failing after the targeted checks above escalate to the gsi dba with the exact error text from ssms copy paste including the line number which script 1 2 3 or 4 is failing the sql server version select version and edition whether prior install attempts on this database have happened leftover state is the most common compounding cause escalated do not proceed to step 8 until the database is fully created install reference database install guide

scenarios.title: Database status shows “Unknown” or “Stopped”
scenarios.data_search: install reference database status unknown or stopped install valc database database status shows unknown or stopped on the databases tab a row shows unknown orange or stopped orange instead of online green the connection between valc and the customer s sql server is broken could be credentials the agent service the firewall the database itself or sql authentication settings walk each layer what you re seeing databases tab row shows unknown or stopped instead of online valc can t reach the customer s sql server walk these checks check 1 verify the edit database fields open the edit database popup for the failing row in valc and verify every field matches the actual database configuration all fields correct continue check 2 confirm rr agent service is running confirm the rr agent service is running on the customer s application server if not start it check today s agent out log file on the application server for connection errors or stack traces service running continue check 3 test reachability and confirm db login exist from the application server attempt a manual connection to the database server on the configured port e g telnet 10 x x x 1433 confirm the customer s dba has created the rapidreconciler_prod database and the rruser sql authentication login confirm mixed mode authentication is enabled on the sql instance for cloud migrated customers aws azure etc reachability failure is more likely a network layer issue security groups nacls or vpc routing rather than a basic firewall block see post migration login fails app server can t reach the database for the cloud specific walkthrough all confirmed if status remains failed escalate to the gsi dba install reference

scenarios.title: Initial load reports errors or zero counts in the diagnostic
scenarios.data_search: install reference initial load reports errors or zero counts install initial load initial load reports errors or zero counts in the diagnostic the first scheduled run of the sql agent job completed but the customer dba s step 11 verification against v_diagnostic4_b_to_c_log shows either non zero errornum values or updatecount 0 for major tables the database install doc is explicit do not proceed to the step 12 valc handoff until the underlying cause is identified and fixed what you re seeing sql agent job s first run completed history shows success or partial success step 11 verification query against v_diagnostic4_b_to_c_log shows non zero errornum values or updatecount 0 across major tables customer dba is asking what to do next or the gsi tech is mid install and blocked before step 12 walk these checks check 1 read the full diagnostic with errornum and errormsg the step 11 query in the install doc filters tightly for triage run a wider query so you can see the error text alongside the counts in ssms connect to rapidreconciler_prod run select capture step process updatecount errornum errormsg from v_diagnostic4_b_to_c_log where step data capture order by capture desc group rows by errornum typically one error code dominates and one fix unblocks most of them dominant error identified match it to one of the patterns below check 2 pattern all updatecount 0 errornum 0 no error this is the dbowner trailing period symptom the package ran cleanly but generated query strings against non existent tables switch to the dedicated runbook ssis package deployed but extracts no data matches this pattern follow the linked runbook then re run step 11 check 3 pattern login or authentication failure error text contains login failed cannot open user default database or authentication failed the package s connection managers can t reach sql server with the credentials baked into the deployment most common cause the destination connection rrlocal is configured with the wrong rruser password or rruser wasn t created see sql script fails during database install check 4 open the package in visual studio right click the failing connection manager edit re enter the password click test connection must succeed before deploying redeploy right click project deploy confirm the package timestamp in ssisdb updated then re execute connection tests pass and redeployed re run the job and re check the diagnostic check 4 pattern invalid object name or column not found error text contains invalid object name cannot find object invalid column name or conversion failed the package s expected jde schema doesn t match what the customer actually has if every jde table is missing check dbowner first see check 2 link wrong schema prefix produces invalid object errors on the first table the package touches if specific tables or columns are missing the customer is on a non standard jde version or has customized columns note the exact object and column name from errormsg and escalate to gsi dba don t guess at workarounds schema shape changes need dba approval identified as schema shape escalate to gsi dba with the failing object names check 5 pattern timeout error text contains timeout expired execution timeout or query timeout expired the jde source is slow under the load of an initial extract and the default 30 second command timeout isn t enough first time loads on larger customers commonly hit this subsequent runs are smaller deltas and won t in the package increase the jde source connection s command timeout or the relevant data flow task s timeout property to 300 seconds or more save redeploy if the same tables time out on subsequent attempts escalate to gsi dba may indicate a missing index on the jde side rather than a tuning issue on the rr side timeout increased and redeployed re run the job and re check the diagnostic check 6 pattern partial counts some tables loaded some didn t most tables show healthy updatecount but a specific table or two shows zero with no error usually means the source table is genuinely empty for this customer identify the affected tables from the diagnostic from ssms connected to the jde source run select count from proddta table for each if the source count is zero confirm with the customer whether they use that jde module some customers don t populate every table the package reads if they don t use it the zero count is expected and the install can proceed if the source count is non zero but rr shows zero treat as a schema or permissions issue and escalate to gsi dba source confirms empty document the table list and proceed otherwise escalate check 7 still failing after targeted fixes if the diagnostic still shows errors or zero counts after working through the matching pattern above escalate to the gsi dba with the full diagnostic query output copy the result grid include capture step process updatecount errornum errormsg the customer s jde version and schema name current package variable values dbowner aastartdategr etc any redeployment timestamps so the dba knows what version of the package they re looking at escalated do not proceed to step 12 valc handoff until the diagnostic shows healthy row counts and zero errornum install reference ssis package deployed but extracts no data

scenarios.title: Migration complete but data not flowing on the new server
scenarios.data_search: install reference migration complete but data not flowing migration cutover migration complete but data not flowing on the new server after migration cutover the customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui on the new server but no new data appears several things are intentionally deferred during migration setup sql agent schedule ssis connection strings cloudflare a record any of which can be the blocker walk the post cutover checklist before escalating what you re seeing ui is reachable on the new server but no new data appears customer reports stale or absent figures after cutover walk the post cutover checklist check 1 sql agent schedule on the new server on the new database server verify the sql agent job schedule is enabled if not enable it trigger a one time manual run of the sql agent job to confirm it works on the new server job runs cleanly continue check 2 ssis package connection strings open the ssis package on the new server and verify all connection strings point to the new server not the old one connections updated continue check 3 cloudflare a record verify with gsi i t daren that the cloudflare a record has been updated to the new server s ip and propagation is complete dns confirmed continue check 4 customer hard refresh have the customer hard refresh their browser to clear any cached ui state resolved stop here otherwise escalate to the gsi dba for ssis database deeper investigation install reference

scenarios.title: SSIS package deployed but extracts no data
scenarios.data_search: install reference ssis package deployed but extracts no data install ssis package configuration ssis package deployed but extracts no data the package deployed cleanly and the sql agent job runs to completion with no errors but the diagnostic log shows updatecount 0 across every major table almost always the dbowner ssis variable was set without the trailing period so the generated source queries point at table names that don t exist in jde what you re seeing ssis package deployed sql agent job runs and reports success v_diagnostic4_b_to_c_log for step data capture shows updatecount 0 across all major tables errornum is 0 the package thinks it succeeded it just received zero rows back from the source no companies no inventory data no transactions populated in the rr ui walk these checks check 1 verify dbowner has the trailing period this is the single most common cause of zero count extracts the package builds source queries by string concatenating dbowner in front of each jde table name open any data flow task e g companies copy f0006 and inspect its qryf0006 variable the expression property reads select mcco mcmcu from user dbowner f0006 where mcmcu if dbowner is proddta the resolved query is select from proddta f0006 correct if dbowner is proddta no period the resolved query becomes select from proddtaf0006 an object that doesn t exist ssis s ole db source treats no matching rows as success so the package runs to completion with updatecount 0 and no errornum open the package in visual studio community open the variables pane view other windows variables find dbowner the value must end with a period e g proddta not proddta the template default is dbo if you see that unchanged on a jde customer the variable was never configured if the period is missing or the schema is wrong fix it save the package file save all then redeploy right click project deploy period present after fix re run the job or execute the package directly from ssisdb see check 4 and re check the diagnostic check 2 confirm the jde source actually has data in the configured schema if dbowner is correct but counts are still zero verify the schema actually contains rows in ssms connect to the jde source instance with the readonly login configured in the package typically rapidrec rapidrec run select top 10 from proddta f4111 replace proddta with whatever the customer s schema actually is if the query returns rows the source is fine if it errors with invalid object name or returns zero you re pointed at the wrong schema or the customer hasn t populated their jde tables yet coordinate with the customer dba to confirm the correct schema name and that jde production data exists source schema correct and populated continue check 3 verify aastartdategr is reasonable the aastartdategr variable bounds the date range the package pulls if it s set to a future date no rows in the past will match and counts will be zero with no error in the variables pane confirm aastartdategr is set at or before the customer s fiscal year start if unsure of the right value ask the gsi dba for the customer s fiscal year configuration before adjusting start date sensible continue check 4 re execute the package and re check the diagnostic after any fix validate by executing the package directly from ssisdb faster than waiting for the next scheduled job run ssms integration services catalogs ssisdb rapidreconciler right click rapidreconciler_prod dtsx execute wait for completion review the report when prompted re run the verification query select capture step process updatecount errornum from v_diagnostic4_b_to_c_log where step data capture order by capture desc confirm updatecount is non zero for the major tables cardex item master etc and errornum is 0 counts non zero initial load is healthy continue to step 11 verification and step 12 valc handoff check 5 still zero counts if counts remain zero after fixing dbowner verifying the source schema and confirming the start date escalate to the gsi dba with the current values of all package variables dbowner aastartdategr decextcost decunitcost decqty decqtycx the jde source connection details server schema login the diagnostic query output from check 4 the customer s jde version non standard table layouts are a known cause and need dba review escalated do not proceed to step 12 valc handoff until the diagnostic shows healthy row counts install reference initial load reports errors

scenarios.title: Post-deployment JDE import fails — rruser login error
scenarios.data_search: install reference post deployment jde import fails rruser login error post deploy ssis post deployment jde import fails rruser login error customer side admin deployed rr to production successfully but the jde import errors out a few minutes in with an rruser authentication failure the first email based response update your connection passwords is correct in principle but often points at the wrong layer rr packages can have hidden rruser references inside data flow sources execute sql tasks and package internal connection managers that the customer s deployment time ui doesn t expose updating values in visual studio is not sufficient by itself redeployment and execution validation are required what you re seeing customer side admin completed a successful production deployment the jde import task errors out a few minutes in with an rruser authentication failure error references the ssis package and a login failure for rruser customer often says they updated the rruser password but it didn t fix it the rapidreconciler_prod sql agent job may already be disabled while troubleshooting walk these checks check 1 first pass confirm deployment time connection passwords the most common fix have the customer update their rruser connection passwords on the production deployment this works for a fraction of cases without needing a live session reply recommending they update the rruser connection passwords on the production deployment set the expectation if it doesn t resolve within 24 hours schedule a teams session for checks 2 5 resolved within 24h stop here otherwise continue to check 2 to set up the teams session check 2 pre teams session prep confirm everything is in place before the call missing access or credentials wastes the customer s time on the call customer admin has access to the rapidreconciler ssis solution visual studio production environment and the sql server e g prd mgs com updated rruser credentials password are in hand the rapidreconciler_prod sql agent job is disabled while troubleshooting so it doesn t fire mid fix and confuse the diagnosis you know which connections to look for typically jdesource and any connection using rruser all in place continue to check 3 on the call check 3 find and update all rruser connections in the package key lesson rr packages can include hidden credential dependencies updating the primary config e g jderr is not enough the package may also reference rruser in data flow sources execute sql tasks or a package internal connection manager miss any one of these and the import keeps failing the same way on the call walk the customer through each layer open the ssis solution in visual studio open the relevant dtsx package the jde import package in the connection managers pane locate every connection using rruser jdesource any database connection tied to the rr database anything else with rruser in the credential for each connection right click edit update server e g prd mgs com database e g proddta for jde authentication type and the username password click test connection this must succeed before moving on if it fails the credential or network is still wrong don t deploy yet walk through each data flow source destination and each execute sql task look for any other reference to rruser or legacy test credentials update them too all connections testing successfully in visual studio continue to check 4 check 4 redeploy and validate the deployment landed visual studio changes are not live until the project is redeployed to ssisdb validate the new package actually arrived deployment can silently fail right click the project deploy deploy to the target sql server ssisdb complete the deployment wizard open ssms integration services catalogs ssisdb find the rapid reconciler project confirm the package s timestamp reflects the deployment you just completed if the timestamp is older the deploy didn t land redeploy timestamp matches the just completed deploy continue to check 5 check 5 execute validate and re enable the schedule two execution paths the ssms direct execute is preferred during troubleshooting faster feedback the sql agent path matches what production will actually do ssms direct execute preferred during troubleshooting in object explorer navigate to ssisdb the package right click execute watch it complete with no auth errors sql agent path matches production behavior sql server agent locate rapidreconciler_prod right click start job at step watch it complete cleanly re enable the rapidreconciler_prod scheduled job typically 6 30 am confirm the next scheduled run completes successfully check the next morning after the call document which package and which connection managers needed updating future credential rotations at the same customer will likely need the same set of updates both manual executions clean and the next scheduled run completes stop here install reference

scenarios.title: Post-migration login fails — app server can’t reach the database
scenarios.data_search: install reference post migration login fails app server can t reach the database migration network plumbing post migration login fails app server can t reach the database after cutover especially to aws or another cloud users get login failures in rapidreconciler even though the database itself is reachable from outside the most common cause is the network path between the new app server and the db server security groups network acls os level firewalls or a stale ip somewhere in the config the architecture expects only outbound from the client verify each layer in turn what you re seeing one or more users often a specific named user the customer mentions first report login failures in rapidreconciler post cutover the db itself is reachable from at least one external client the dba can connect via ssms or similar customer confirms outbound traffic is open from their network and the app server is not joined to their domain error wording varies connection timeout login failed for user rruser or a tcp named pipe transport error walk these checks check 1 confirm post migration ips in app side config verify the application server is pointing at the correct new db ip e g the new aws internal ip verify the db server ip itself matches what the migration plan specified search the app server config for any stale hardcoded ip from the old environment in connection strings app config files or environment variables all ips current continue check 2 test app server db network reachability from the app server run test netconnection db host port 1433 powershell or telnet db host 1433 if a hostname is used instead of an ip confirm dns resolution from the app server confirm outbound traffic on the sql port is permitted from the app server tcp open continue otherwise the issue is at the network layer check 3 check 3 aws security groups nacls os firewalls vpc routing the db server s aws security group inbound rules permit sql traffic port 1433 from the app server s ip or cidr network acls on the db subnet permit the same windows or linux os level firewall on the db server has the same allow rule subnet vpc routing between app server and db server is in place architecture note rapidreconciler expects the customer side only requires outbound connectivity no inbound port exposure on the client side if a customer s network admin is asking which ports to open inbound on their network that s a sign of a misconception worth correcting on the call network path clear continue check 4 restart rr services then read the failure wording after any ip connection string or config change on the app server restart the rapid reconciler 7 agent service service name rr valc agent so the new values are picked up restarting the parent agent terminates and respawns every java exe child it supervises check the application log for the failure mode wording this tells you which layer is still broken connection timeout network path back to check 2 3 login failed for user rruser sql auth credentials login enabled mixed mode tcp named pipe transport error sql server isn t listening or the protocol is disabled check sql server logs on the db server for failed login entries timestamped to your test attempts wording points to a specific layer address it otherwise continue to check 5 check 5 end to end login test login as the affected user and a known good test account if available confirm the ui loads after login and data renders without timeout if login still fails after checks 1 4 capture app log excerpt with the error sql server log entries at the same timestamp and the connection string in use escalate to network admin and dba together this class of failure usually needs both perspectives login works end to end stop here install reference

scenarios.title: Setup Step not advancing automatically after install
scenarios.data_search: install reference setup step not advancing automatically install valc state setup step not advancing automatically after install after completing an install or migration the setup step field on the client details tab remains at created or an earlier value and doesn t advance either the install didn t finish cleanly or the setup step legitimately needs to be moved manually for this install path what you re seeing setup step on client details remains at created or earlier post install migration other parts of the install appear to have completed agent installed database online row connected but the state hasn t auto advanced walk these checks check 1 confirm the install actually completed end to end agent installed on the application server database showing online on the databases tab client row showing connected on the clients grid all green continue to check 2 otherwise fix the failing layer first check 2 manually advance setup step on the client details tab manually advance setup step to the appropriate next value if unsure what value to set check another active client of the same install path for reference save the change and refresh the clients grid to confirm the row updates resolved stop here install reference

scenarios.title: SSIS catalog deployment fails — permission denied
scenarios.data_search: install reference ssis catalog deployment fails permission denied install ssis deployment ssis catalog deployment fails permission denied deploying the ssis package to the ssisdb catalog fails with a permission authentication error three things to check the deploying account s privileges the auth mode used and whether ssisdb itself exists on the target instance what you re seeing permission denied or authentication error during ssis package deployment deployment from visual studio or isdeploymentwizard fails before package upload completes walk these checks check 1 use windows authentication confirm the deployment is using windows authentication not sql authentication auth mode confirmed continue check 2 verify deploying account privileges the deploying account needs sysadmin or ssis_admin privileges on the target sql server instance privileges in place continue check 3 confirm ssisdb exists confirm the ssisdb catalog exists on the target instance if not create it object explorer integration services catalogs create catalog before re running the deployment if sql agent job steps will run under a proxy account ensure the proxy has access to any unc paths used by the package catalog created re run deployment otherwise escalate to the gsi dba install reference

scenarios.title: SSIS package deployment fails — OLE DB driver error
scenarios.data_search: install reference ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error install ssis deployment ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error during ssis package deployment an error indicates the ole db provider for jde is not installed or cannot be found almost always a driver installation issue on the database server wrong bitness 32 vs 64 wrong version or simply not installed what you re seeing ssis deployment error referencing missing or unrecognized ole db provider for jde error includes wording like provider is not registered or cannot be found walk these checks check 1 verify both 32 bit and 64 bit ole db providers are installed on the database server verify both 32 bit and 64 bit versions of the required ole db provider are installed ssis executes packages in either bitness depending on the run mode missing one half causes the failure both present re run the deployment check 2 re install the ole db provider with both architectures if missing install the jde ole db provider in both x86 and x64 versions on the db server then re run the ssis package deployment for next time verify driver installation before the install meeting this is a known cause of install delays and is easy to confirm in advance resolved stop here otherwise escalate to the gsi dba install reference

scenarios.title: UI loads but agent is not connecting
scenarios.data_search: install reference ui loads but agent is not connecting post deploy agent connectivity ui loads but agent is not connecting customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui at their domain url but the valc clients grid shows the agent as disconnected or no data appears in the ui almost always an ip change issue the customer s internal ip changed and either valc or the dns a record still points at the old one what you re seeing customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui at their domain url valc clients grid shows the agent as disconnected or no data appears in the ui walk these checks check 1 compare valc s recorded internal ip to the actual current ip in valc open client details and note the agent internal ip address confirm with the customer the actual current internal ip of the application server if they don t match update the ip in valc ip updated continue check 2 submit a dns update if needed if the internal ip changed submit a dns update request to gsi i t daren with the corrected internal ip request submitted continue check 3 confirm rr agent service is running on the application server confirm the rr agent service is running after dns propagation confirm the clients grid row updates to connected connected after propagation stop here otherwise escalate to network tech install reference
